description: AlgoVoi crypto payments via MCP: USDC + native on Algorand, VOI, Hedera, Stellar.

lifecycle.reason: Missing required package metadata (runtimeHint or identifier)

name: io.github.chopmob-cloud/algovoi-mcp-server

environmentVariables.description: Your AlgoVoi API key. Use an algvc_... key from https://dash.algovoi.co.uk for the Cloud path (recommended), or an algv_... key for direct API access.
environmentVariables.name: ALGOVOI_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: AlgoVoi API base URL. Defaults to https://cloud.algovoi.co.uk when using a Cloud key. Set to https://api1.ilovechicken.co.uk for direct API access.
environmentVariables.name: ALGOVOI_API_BASE

environmentVariables.description: Tenant UUID. Required only for direct-API keys (algv_...). Leave unset when using AlgoVoi Cloud.
environmentVariables.name: ALGOVOI_TENANT_ID

environmentVariables.description: Default payout wallet address. Required only for direct-API keys. Managed centrally in the AlgoVoi Cloud dashboard otherwise.
environmentVariables.name: ALGOVOI_PAYOUT_ADDRESS

environmentVariables.description: Optional HMAC-SHA256 secret for webhook verification. Enables the verify_webhook tool.
environmentVariables.name: ALGOVOI_WEBHOOK_SECRET
